title: Telegram Bot
name: Telegram
description: Connect your bot do Telegram for automatic support

botToken.label: Bot Token
botToken.helpText: Get the token by talking to @BotFather on Telegram

instructions.title: How to Create a Bot on Telegram
instructions.step1: 1. Start a conversation with @BotFather on Telegram
instructions.step2: 2. Type /newbot and follow the instructions to create your bot
instructions.step3: 3. Define a name for your bot (ex: "My Support Bot")
instructions.step4: 4. Define a username that ends with "bot" (ex: "my_support_bot")
instructions.step5: 5. Copy the token that BotFather will provide
instructions.step6: 6. Copy the token above and create the channel

webhook.title: Automatic Configuration
webhook.description: The webhook will be configured automatically when you create the channel:
webhook.note: It is not necessary to configure manually on Telegram!

commands.title: Recommended Commands for the Bot
commands.description: You can configure these commands with @BotFather using /setcommands:
commands.list:
start - Start conversation
help - Get help
support - Talk to support
status - Check support status

errors.createError: Error creating Telegram channel. Verify the bot token.

howToCreate.title: How to Create a Bot on Telegram
howToCreate.step2: Type /newbot and follow the instructions to create your bot
howToCreate.step3: Define a name for your bot (ex: "My Support Bot")
howToCreate.step4: Define a username that ends with "bot" (ex: "my_support_bot")
howToCreate.step5: Copy the token provided and paste above
